3318920.name: Quickball
3318920.description:
Quickball is an adrenaline-fueled multiplayer game that turns fast-paced action into a battle for the goal. Pick the ball up, outmaneuver your rivals, and slam it into the enemy goal to claim victory. With advanced movement mechanics and unique character abilities, every match is a high-stakes showdown of skill and strategy.

Key Features:

  • Dynamic Movement Mechanics: Master fluid moves like wall running, vaulting, sliding, climbing, and mid-air vaults. Each environment is your playground, built for slick dodges, clever plays, and clutch scoring runs.

  • Unique Character Abilities: Select from a roster of characters, each with three distinct abilities fueled by collectible energy. Use them to outsmart opponents, defend your ball carrier, or secure the perfect shot.

  • Multiple Game Modes: Go head-to-head in 1v1 or team up with 3-4 players. Classic Goal Rush mode pits teams against each other to score the most points before time runs out. Speedrun Mode challenges you to race the ball to the goal fastest, testing your movement mastery.

  • Diverse Levels with Unique Twists: Every map brings fresh layouts, obstacles, and environmental quirks, keeping matches unpredictable and intense.

In Quickball, every game is a 5 minute match, blending teamwork, precision, and raw agility. Whether you’re stealing the ball or lining up the winning shot, victory hinges on outplaying the competition. Join friends or dive into solo matches and feel the rush of this next-level multiplayer showdown!
3318920.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
